---
title: "Datastream"
page-layout: article
---

# Datastream

**Provider:** LSEG

## Description

Historical financial database containing securities prices, economic indicators, commodities, bonds, and market data. Supports quantitative finance, investment analysis, and economic research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Humanities & History
- **Data/resource type:** Financial & Market Data, Government & International Statistics, Historical Archives
- **Access model:** WRDS Account Required, Request Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Financial & Market Data, Government & International Statistics, Historical Archives

## Links

- [Access resource](https://guides.library.yale.edu/Workspace/Datastream)
- [Request access](https://forms.office.com/pages/responsepage.aspx?id=u76M3Tkh-E20EU4-h6vrXGa2PpecL_VHoOa9Jy4XGNVURDdNSUpFT0JDMEw2WlNCOEQ4NE1KSklNUyQlQCN0PWcu&route=shorturl)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
